title: auth — notification classes + categories
description: Seven notifications. Two are transactional-required (password-reset-link, email-verification-link). Five are informational-security (login-from-new-device, login-from-new-location, password-changed-from-new-device, impersonation-session-active, mfa-enrolled-confirmation) with default-on opt-in.

payload_bindings.request_ip_geolocation: string (city, country — GeoIP best-effort, empty on unresolved)

notification_definitions.notes: Fires alongside identity::PasswordResetNotification. Auth's version carries the signed URL (auth-service HTTP surface owns URL generation); identity's version is a semantic dupe kept for module-boundary clarity. During code implementation, decide which one is canonical and remove the duplicate — for the blueprint they're both listed.
Same duplicate-fires pattern as password reset.

notification_definitions.default_subject_en: New device sign-in on your Academorix account

payload_bindings.review_sessions_url: string (deep link to /auth/sessions on the SPA)

notification_definitions.notes: Opt-in per new_device_notifications entitlement. Default channels include in_app so an authenticated caller sees a banner immediately.

notification_definitions.default_subject_en: Unusual sign-in location on your Academorix account
notification_definitions.notes: Dispatched by a listener when the login's GeoIP resolves to a city not seen in the last 30 days for this User. Suppressed if LoginFromNewDeviceNotification also fires (single notification per login, not two).

notification_definitions.default_subject_en: Your password was changed from a new device
notification_definitions.notes: Fires when a password reset OR change originates from a device fingerprint not seen in the last 30 days. Higher-severity variant of identity::PasswordChangedConfirmationNotification.

notification_definitions.default_subject_en: Academorix support is currently signed in to your account
notification_definitions.notes: The impersonated User has a legal right to know. Cannot be opted out (transactional-required). Also renders as an in-app banner throughout the impersonation session.

notification_definitions.default_subject_en: Two-factor authentication is now enabled on your Academorix account

payload_bindings.review_url: string (deep link to the SPA's security-settings page)

notification_definitions.notes: Non-actionable confirmation. Signals the account holder that MFA is now protecting them.

categories.description: Time-limited reset URL. Distinct from identity's password-reset category (which is the semantic event); this is the auth-issued link.
Alert when a login originates from a device fingerprint not seen in the last 30 days.
Alert when a login's GeoIP resolves to a city not seen in the last 30 days.

categories.display_name: Password changed from a new device
categories.description: Higher-severity variant of the standard password-changed confirmation. Includes revoke-all-sessions deep link.
Alert to the impersonated User while a platform-staff impersonation session is active. Cannot be opted out (legal right to know).
